feature: One-Command Remote Agent Deploy (hex agent spawn-remote)
description: Make remote agent deployment a single command: hex agent spawn-remote gary@bazzite.local. Nexus handles SSH, binary provisioning, tunnel setup, and agent launch automatically.

steps.title: Add remote provisioner to SshAdapter — detect arch (uname -m), check/deploy hex-agent binary
steps.notes: Uses existing SshAdapter::run_command for uname -m and build-hash check. SshAdapter::upload_file for binary deploy. Checks ~/.hex/bin/hex-agent on remote. Falls back to cargo build if no pre-built binary matches arch.

steps.title: Add cross-compile targets to CI or local build script for linux-x86_64 and linux-aarch64
steps.notes: Script that builds hex-agent for linux targets. Uses cross (cargo install cross) or rustup target add. Outputs to target/{arch}/release/hex-agent. Only needed when binary distribution is preferred over remote cargo build.

T1.name: Spawn Orchestration — Wire Provision + Tunnel + Launch

steps.title: Implement spawn_remote_full in AgentLifecycleAdapter — provision, tunnel, launch, wait for register
steps.notes: New method that orchestrates the 4-phase spawn protocol from ADR-040 §8. Phase 1: provision binary via SshAdapter. Phase 2: establish reverse tunnel via SshTunnelAdapter. Phase 3: SSH exec hex-agent with env vars. Phase 4: wait for Register message on WS transport, send RegisterAck, start heartbeat.

steps.title: Wire spawn_remote_full into IAgentLifecyclePort and routes/agents.rs spawn_remote_agent handler
steps.notes: Update the port trait with spawn_remote_full signature. Update the route handler to call it instead of the current stub. The route already accepts SpawnRemoteRequest with host, user, port, project_dir, key_path.

steps.title: Update hex-cli agent spawn-remote command to pass all required fields and show progress
steps.notes: Parse user@host format. Show progress: Provisioning... Tunnel... Launching... Connected. Handle errors with actionable messages (e.g., 'SSH key not found', 'binary build failed').

steps.title: Add reconnect-on-drop to spawned agents — detect tunnel death, re-provision if needed
steps.notes: When heartbeat monitor detects dead agent, check if it was a spawned remote agent (has tunnel_id). If so, attempt automatic respawn using stored SshTunnelConfig. Max 3 respawn attempts before marking as permanently dead.

steps.title: Add hex agent status command — show agent detail, tunnel health, last heartbeat, uptime
steps.notes: Richer than 'hex agent info'. Shows: tunnel health (connected/degraded/disconnected), last heartbeat timestamp, uptime, tasks completed, models available, project dir.

steps.title: Integration test: full spawn-remote cycle against bazzite.local
steps.notes: End-to-end test: spawn_remote_full → verify agent registers → send chat message → verify response → disconnect → verify cleanup. Requires bazzite.local reachable. #[ignore] by default.

existing: hex-agent binary — already has hub-managed mode with --hub-url

successCriteria: hex agent spawn-remote gary@bazzite.local --project-dir ~/projects/hex-intf → agent online in <30s
hex agent list shows bazzite agent with status=online, host=bazzite.local, models=[qwen3.5:27b]
Binary auto-provisioned to ~/.hex/bin/hex-agent on bazzite if missing or outdated
hex agent disconnect <id> cleanly kills remote process and tears down tunnel
mergeOrder: T1-1 → T1-2 → T1-3 sequential (orchestration → port wiring → CLI)
T2-1, T2-2, T2-3 parallel (resilience, UX, test)
